name: Maxey Cerliano

contactInfo.office: 101 E. Methvin St., Suite 588, Longview, TX 75601

bio: Maxey Cerliano serves as the Gregg County Sheriff, overseeing one of the busier sheriff's offices in East Texas from the county seat of Longview. Sheriff Cerliano leads a department focused on combating crime and ensuring public safety in the growing Gregg County area.
campaignPromises: Aggressively combat gang activity and violent crime
Expand the use of technology in crime prevention and investigation
Maintain a fully staffed and well-equipped sheriff's department
Enhance mental health crisis response capabilities
Strengthen partnerships with Longview PD and other local agencies
